stage_identity.evidence: Teen Byte form maintained with gangly limbs, big expressive eyes, blue-ish blob appearance. Proportions consistent with teen stage anchor.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art with dithered shading preserved. No painterly or photoreal drift detected.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Byte is awake with wide open eyes, Z's removed. Morning golden-pink lighting visible through window. Transition from night to morning completed. Byte positioned at desk with laptop active.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf: 1 golden trophy on left, 1 green plant on right, proper spacing. Food bowl: 1 instance on floor, nearly empty. All props single-instance as intended.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk present with oversized laptop, Chicago skyline window visible with morning light, Byte at primary foreground.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Morning lighting (golden-pink) matches temporal state. Byte awake and alert matches is_sleeping=false. Ecstatic mood reflected in wide eyes and upright posture.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Mode is normal, not re-ground. Check not applicable.
